column1: # Recurrent pathogenic CNV syndrome regions (GRCh38 / hg38).
# A consensus CNV is surfaced in the report's Clinical Findings only if it covers
# >=50% of one of these critical regions AND its type is compatible (DEL/DUP/BOTH).
# Coordinates are approximate critical regions (recurrent CNVs are flanked by segmental
# duplications); the overlap-fraction gate tolerates breakpoint imprecision.
# Sources: ClinGen dosage map, DECIPHER, ISCA recurrent-CNV list, OMIM.
